lang_modal.title: -- Tongue of the Lands Between --
audio.toggle: Mute or unmute the chanting of the Two Fingers
nav.role: Code Bearer / Sage of the Erdtree
photo.alt: Portrait of the Tarnished Charles Lindecker
404.title: Thou art banished from these lands
404.lead: The path thou walked has crumbled, or was never forged. Only the most grace-touched Tarnished find their way through the withered ruins of the Lands Between.
